scripts.test:twice: npx playwright test || npx playwright test
scripts.cucumber:ndjson: npx cucumber-js tests/features --require-module ts-node/register/transpile-only --require tests/step_definitions/**/*.ts --require tests/features/support/**/*.ts --format message:artifacts/cucumber.ndjson
scripts.cucumber:report: npm run cucumber:ndjson && npm run cucumber:html
scripts.cucumber:trace: npx cucumber-js tests/features --require-module ts-node/register --require tests/step_definitions/**/*.ts --require tests/features/support/**/*.ts
